meaning: n.吸收计,吸收测定器,溶气汁,调稠器
examples: The bone density of the mandibular angle and coxofemoral region can be measured with dual-energy X-ray absorptiometer.
Objective To analyze the coefficient of variation(CV) by measurements of bone mineral density with the dual-energy X-ray absorptiometer(DXA, Prodigy).
